rulings.Case Title: JENNIFER JAN KIRKLEY VS. ZELJKO MARKOVIC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Ccp 664.6
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 14, 2014 line 5. PLAINTIFF JENNIFER KIRKLEY Notice Of Motion And Motion To Enforce Settlement Ccp 664.6. GRANTED. After defendant purportedly surrendered possession to plaintiff, defendant denied plaintiff access to the premises. No evidence is provided by defendant as to his current residence. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SHREE JALARAM LODGING LP DBA BUDGET INN VS. WILLIAM EERKOFF
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, January 14, 2014 line 2. DEFENDANT WILLIAM EEKHOF MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. OFF CALENDAR, moot. Order Granting Ex-Parte Application and Judgment are vacated on Court's own motion as Plaintiff failed to file its ex-parte application with the Court. = (501/REQ)
